GB/T 39928一2021
3.1
LED lamp
LED light source with one or more lamp caps
NOTE 1 LED lamp can be integrated LED lamp (LEDi lamp) ,semi integrated LED lamp (LEDsi lamp) or non-integrated

LED lamp (LEDni lamp).
NOTE 2 Including single capped or double capped lamp.
NOTE 3 ”LED lamps are designed to be installed by ordinary people (as defined in IEC 60050-826 .826.18.03).
NOTE 4 LED lights consist of one or more LED modules and other possible components,， such as one or more electron-
ic，optical，mechanical，thermal components，interfaces and controllers.
NOTE 5 “Rewrite GB/T 24826一2016，definition 3.15.
3.2
integrated LED lamp
LEDi lamp
including the controlgear and any additional elements necessary for the light source to stable opera-
tion，which is designed to be directly connected to the power supply voltage
[GB/T 24826一2016,definition 3.15.1]
3.3
LED filament lamp
The shape and structure of the lamp is similar to that of the traditional incandescent lamp. The light-
emitting part is an LED module which imitates the light-emitting state of the filament of the incan-
descent lamp and is sealed in the transparent bulb shell.
3.4
initial values
photometric，colorimetric and electrical characteristic values of the lamp measured after the parame-
ters are stable
NOTE 1 Aging is not required for the measurement of initial values.
NOTE 2 ”Rewrite GB/T 24823一2017，definition 3.3.
3
